name: create_signature_request
description: Send a document to one or more recipients for electronic signature. You must provide at least one file (via file_urls or file content) and at least one signer with name and email. Each signer will receive an email with a link to sign the document. You can optionally set a subject line, message, signing order, and form fields. The request returns a signature_request_id you can use to track status. Authentication uses HTTP Basic Auth with your API key as the username and no password.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the signature request, visible to all signers.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the email sent to signers.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: A custom message included in the email to signers.

parameters.name: signers
parameters.description: Array of signer objects, each with 'email_address', 'name', and optionally 'order' (for signing order).

parameters.name: file_urls
parameters.description: Array of URLs pointing to documents to be signed. At least one of file_urls or files is required.

parameters.name: test_mode
parameters.description: Set to true to create the request in test mode (not legally binding). Default: false.

parameters.name: use_text_tags
parameters.description: Set to true to enable text tag parsing in the document for automatic form field placement.

body.title: Employment Agreement
body.subject: Please sign the Employment Agreement
body.message: Hi, please review and sign this employment agreement at your earliest convenience.

signature_request.title: Employment Agreement
signature_request.subject: Please sign the Employment Agreement
signature_request.message: Hi, please review and sign this employment agreement at your earliest convenience.
